violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Refrigerator holding cream was temping at 48 degrees, not holding product at the proper temperature of 41 degrees or less.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving if the production area and in the dry storage are bare wood and need to be non absorbent and easily cleanable.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine has spillage and needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use cups being stored on cardboard, needs to be on a nonabsorbent cleanable surface.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
